title: alchemilla palmata subsp. heteropoda
intro: Alchemilla palmata subsp. heteropoda is a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle, a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and injuries due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla palmata subsp. heteropoda include its ability to soothe and protect the skin, reduce swelling and pain, and promote the healing of cuts and abrasions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
